title: Problem with dates changing by themselves in workflow
excerpt: Hi my dates of workflow on a part of my board have changed to years in the future (2560 and further) i cannot change them back, anybody know how to fix this or get in touch with monday on this subject - no responses yet …

posts.author: yvonne (yvonne koert)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi my dates of workflow on a part of my board have changed to years in the future (2560 and further) i cannot change them back, anybody know how to fix this or get in touch with monday on this subject - no responses yet from monday since this morning-

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @yvonne (this is my sister’s name!), welcome to the community.

Did you create these dates via an app? Or did they just randomly change to this date on their own? Any context here would help.

It would also help to see a screenshot of your board (feel free to DM or email into appsupport@monday.com if these contain sensitive information) with these date columns, so I can see why this may have occurred.

Thanks!
Helen

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @yvonne,

Closing this for now as I see that there hasn’t been a response in a while.

Should the issue still be there, please do write into appsupport@monday.com.

Thanks!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
